scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "docker compose up --build" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:host-server: docker compose up -d db && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && DATABASE_URL=postgres://aitown:aitown_dev@localhost:5432/aitown npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
